query:
UPDATE sessions
            SET tenant_memberships = (
                SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(
                    CASE
                        WHEN (elem->>'tenant_id')::uuid = $1
                        THEN jsonb_set(elem, '{role}', to_jsonb($2::text))
                        ELSE elem
                    END
                ), '[]'::jsonb)
                FROM jsonb_array_elements(tenant_memberships) AS elem
            )
            WHERE user_id = $3 AND expires_at > NOW()
